homepage.title: Share Secrets Securely | Onetime Secret
homepage.description: Share sensitive information securely with self-destructing links. Paste your secret, generate a link, and share it. Once viewed, it's gone forever
homepage.a-trusted-way-to-share-sensitive-informa: A trusted way to share sensitive information that self-destructs after being viewed.

hero.subtitle: Send passwords, credentials, and sensitive data through links that self-destruct after being viewed.

features.label: Security architecture
features.heading: Built to forget.
features.description: Every design decision serves one purpose: make sure secrets are readable exactly once, then gone.

useCases.label: Use cases
useCases.heading: How teams use Onetime Secret
useCases.description: From onboarding a new hire to rotating production credentials, sensitive data moves through organizations every day.

infrastructure.label: Global infrastructure
infrastructure.heading: Your data, your jurisdiction.
infrastructure.description: Choose where your secrets are stored and processed. Regional instances ensure your data never leaves the geography you choose.

cta.description: Free for individuals and teams. Plans for custom branding, advanced controls, and more.

howItWorks.label: How it works
howItWorks.title: Three steps. Zero residue.
howItWorks.subtitle: Share sensitive information without leaving a trail in your email, chat logs, or ticketing systems.

step1.title: Paste your secret
step1.description: Enter any sensitive text: passwords, API keys, credentials, private notes. Set an expiration and optional passphrase.

step2.title: Share the link
step2.description: Get a unique, one-time URL. Send it over any channel: email, Slack, text. The link itself reveals nothing about the content.

step3.title: It self-destructs
step3.description: Once the recipient views the secret, the data is permanently destroyed. The link is dead. No one, including us, can retrieve it.

visual_examples.title: Custom Domain & Branding
visual_examples.subtitle: Reinforce your brand and build trust by using your own domain and logo.
visual_examples.sr_description: An image carousel showing screenshots of examples of using onetime secret with custom branding.

featureHighlights.sectionSubtitle: Discover what makes Onetime Secret the preferred solution for secure information sharing.

security.title: Enhanced Privacy Options
security.description: Add a passphrase for an extra layer of security. Only those with the passphrase can view the secret.

encryption.title: End-to-end encryption
encryption.description: Secrets are encrypted at rest and in transit. The decryption key is embedded in the URL fragment, never sent to our servers, never logged. We can't read your data even if compelled.

selfDestruction.title: Read once, gone forever
selfDestruction.description: After a single view, the secret is permanently purged from all storage. No copies, no recovery, no trace.

dataResidency.title: Regional data storage
dataResidency.description: Choose where your secrets live: EU, US, or other regions. Meet data sovereignty requirements at the point of creation.

compliance.title: Helps teams meet compliance goals
compliance.description: Built to support SOC 2, GDPR, CCPA, and HIPAA workflows. Audit logs, access controls, and SSO help teams meet their own compliance requirements.

api.title: Developer API
api.description: Integrate secret sharing into your workflows, CI/CD pipelines, and internal tools. Full REST API with language-specific SDKs.
